warnings: No filled Vb pour bridges the FET drain to the local Cin on F.Cu — the Altium importer most likely DROPPED it (importer bug 3). relayer=faithful does not synthesize a bridging pour, so the FET drain reaches the local Cin over TRACK copper only (or not at all): L_loop is extracted through a Vin path narrower than the real board's. Cross-check against a KiCad GUI import, use --relayer partial to bridge it, or restore the pour in the GUI.
